name: Black Pepper Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine flour, pepper, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Whisk together butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Beat in eggs and egg whites one at a time, mixing well to distribute the butter.
5. Add the dry ingredients and mix until almost smooth.
6. Stir in the chopped dried figs.
7. Shape the dough into two logs, each about 14 inches long and 1-1/2 inches thick on a floured surface.
8. Place the logs on a prepared baking sheet and press the tops to flatten to 1/2 inch high.
9. Bake for 18 to 23 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
10. Transfer the logs to a rack to cool.
11. Reduce the oven temperature to 300 degrees.
12. Cut the logs diagonally into 1/2-inch thick slices.
13. Stand the slices upright on the baking sheet and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
14. Let cool before storing.
Makes about 4 dozen biscotti. Each biscotto contains 40 calories, 1 gram of fat, 47 mg sodium, and 9 mg cholesterol. These will stay fresh for a month or more when stored in an airtight container.
